name: ruby-ffi
title: ruby-ffi
summary: load dynamic libraries, bind functions from within ruby code
description:
load dynamic libraries, bind functions from within ruby code
Ruby-FFI is a ruby extension for programmatically loading dynamic
libraries, binding functions within them, and calling those functions
from Ruby code. Moreover, a Ruby-FFI extension works without changes
on Ruby and JRuby. Discover why should you write your next extension
using Ruby-FFI at https://github.com/ffi/ffi/wiki/Why-use-FFI.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use ruby-ffi because load dynamic libraries, bind functions from within ruby code.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use ruby-ffi as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair ruby-ffi with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `ruby-ffi --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
